164 BHRlGU NANDI NADI
CHART 241
The Rahu line and the Ketu line
in the palm of this native indicate that Mars Jupt.
Rahu and Ketu have gobbled up all Dt. Sat.
good fortune leaving the native bereft.
Sun
of any happiness.
Mer.
The native will have very little
Yen.
education and lead a miserable life. He
will live as a person midway between a
hermit and a house-holder. He will Moon Dh.
earn his livelihood through very hard
work.
Till his 28th year, there will be no progress in his trade or his
fortune. After 28 years of age, he will be a little better off. During his
35th year, he will be transferred to a different department. There will be
a very slight improvement in his life.
